contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 40
- Description: Two cross-cutting design pattern docs: Four-Wire Loop + Build/Document/Story
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/135
  
  Details:
  Generalized two patterns surfaced after Gary noticed the recurring shape across the day's autopilot self-healing + bell + scheduler arcs.
  
  ## Shipped (agentic_ai_context PR #135, merged)
  
  - FOUR_WIRE_LOOP_PATTERN.md (~290 lines) — names the architectural shape that recurs across autopilot self-healing, Partner Poke Scheduler, currency conversion, asset receipt: report path / classify path / lookup path / dedup path, plus the visibility layer (action label + source label, e.g. AI/proposed fix on both GitHub PR and Gmail). Worked examples table, when-to-use / when-not-to-use, six anti-patterns, adding-a-new-loop 8-item checklist, and the closing 'why this pattern recurs' section grounded in operator-as-judgment-layer / substrate-as-toil-layer (refs The Do Nothing Society for the inverse case where toil and judgment are fused).
  
  - BUILD_DOCUMENT_STORY.md (~270 lines) — captures the three-artifact pipeline Gary named explicitly today. Each artifact (production / documentation / story) has its own audience, its own must-contain list, its own must-not-contain list. Notes the sequence isn't strict (sometimes document-first, rarely story-first), and that the story artifact can correctly be skipped when the lesson doesn't generalize beyond TrueSight's stack. Worked examples include a deliberate skip-the-story case (currency conversion). Five anti-patterns including the most insidious one (bundling all three into one PR — different review needs).
  
  - Cross-linked DAPP_NOTIFICATION_BADGE.md to FOUR_WIRE_LOOP_PATTERN.md as the meta-architecture the bell is the visibility layer for.
  
  ## Why these matter
  Both patterns we've been running implicitly for weeks. Naming them explicitly makes them:
  - Reviewable (a PR introducing a new loop can be checked against the four-wire checklist)
  - Teachable (the next session opens with a one-page spec instead of reverse-engineering from code)
  - Harder to drift from (documenting the anti-patterns is the durable defense against re-litigating the same decisions)
  
  The Four-Wire Loop will accelerate the upstream stages of the AI-first supply chain vision (shipping decisions, sourcing quotas, video-to-page propagation) — each new loop is now a checklist instance, not a fresh design.
  
  The Build/Document/Story pipeline closes a documentation gap that's been an ongoing low-level worry — without the discipline being named, individual arcs sometimes shipped code without the corresponding doc, and the institutional memory leaked.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/135 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 66.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
